largest-contentful-paint.title: Largest Contentful Paint
largest-contentful-paint.description: Largest Contentful Paint marks the time at which the largest text or image is painted.

first-contentful-paint.title: First Contentful Paint
first-contentful-paint.description: First Contentful Paint marks the time at which the first text or image is painted.

cumulative-layout-shift.title: Cumulative Layout Shift
cumulative-layout-shift.description: Cumulative Layout Shift measures the movement of visible page content.

server-response-time.title: Initial server response time was short
server-response-time.description: Keep the server response time for the main document short.

total-blocking-time.title: Total Blocking Time
total-blocking-time.description: Sum of all time periods between FCP and Time to Interactive.

max-potential-fid.title: Max Potential First Input Delay
max-potential-fid.description: The maximum potential First Input Delay that users could experience.

render-blocking-resources.title: Eliminate render-blocking resources
render-blocking-resources.description: Resources are blocking the first paint of your page.

unused-javascript.title: Reduce unused JavaScript
unused-javascript.description: Reduce unused JavaScript and defer loading scripts until they are required.

uses-text-compression.title: Enable text compression
uses-text-compression.description: Text-based resources should be served with compression to minimize total network bytes.

aria-allowed-attr.title: ARIA attributes match their roles
aria-allowed-attr.description: Each ARIA role supports a specific subset of aria-* attributes.

document-title.title: Document has a title element
document-title.description: The title gives screen reader users an overview of the page.

network-rtt.title: Network round trip times
network-rtt.description: Network round trip times (RTT) have a large impact on performance.
